payload.answer: I’m not sure which thing from yesterday you mean. Please clarify what you want me to remember.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, task, or event you want remembered from yesterday.
If this refers to an existing memory, identify it by name, topic, or details so it can be considered.
If you want to add a new memory, provide the durable detail in a clear sentence.
If you do not want anything saved yet, say to ignore this request.
